title: viola delphinantha
intro: Viola delphinantha, also known as Panay viola or Purple pansy orchid, is a flowering plant native to the Philippines, belonging to the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Viola delphinantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
